generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUT10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST‑10LX LiDAR providing 3D point‑cloud acquisition over ROS2 topic /lidar/points"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudStream
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i depth camera delivering stereo images over ROS2 topic /camera/depth/image_raw"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageStream
]

instance WheelSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Wheel speed sensor generating vehicle velocity data over ROS2 topic /wheel/speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WheelSpeedStream
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor providing heading data over ROS2 topic /steering/angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleStream
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUT10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance WheelSpeedStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WheelSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data (input data from enablers)
instance DBSCANClusterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering model (MATLAB/Simulink) for LiDAR point‑cloud segmentation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter tracking model for estimating object state from LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance ACCFeedForwardModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC feed‑forward control model mapping lead‑vehicle distance to desired speed"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabaseSchemaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SQL database schema for persisting vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingEnabler
]

instance Rendering3DModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D rendering model for visualizing vehicle motion and environment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

// C10: Data instances
instance LiDARPointCloud : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud received from LiDARPointCloudStream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DepthImage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth image received from DepthImageStream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance WheelSpeed : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle wheel speed received from WheelSpeedStream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WheelSpeedStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle received from SteeringAngleStream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance ClusteringSegmentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point‑cloud segments produced by DBSCANClusterModel"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance TrackingStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object state estimates generated by KalmanFilterTrackingModel"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance ACCDesiredSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Desired speed computed by ACCFeedForwardModel"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ACCCommandData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "ACC control command transmitted to vehicle E‑S controller"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance RenderingVisualizationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D visualization output from Rendering3DModel"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance StoredVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Persisted vehicle state and object tracks stored by SQLDatabaseSchemaModel"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data translation and processing enabler handling ROS2 topic serialization, unit conversion, and model execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control enabler facilitating low‑latency command delivery and remote ACC management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance LoggingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Logging enabler storing vehicle state and object tracks into SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring UI displaying vehicle state, projected trajectory, detected object tracks, with logging and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateInsight, ProjectedTrajectoryInsight, DetectedObjectTracksInsight, TimeSeriesReportInsight, LogDataAction, GenerateTimeSeriesReportAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computational offloading service running ACC algorithms on edge server, reducing on‑board ECU load"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management UI allowing operators to enable/disable ACC, modify desired speed, and trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance RealTimeVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time vehicle state insight showing speed, steering angle, and sensor status"
]

instance ProjectedTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected trajectory insight displaying predicted vehicle path based on current dynamics"
]

instance DetectedObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks insight visualizing tracked objects from LiDAR and depth data"
]

instance TimeSeriesReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time‑series report insight summarizing vehicle metrics over selected periods"
]

// C17: Actions
instance LogDataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to log current vehicle state and sensor data to persistent storage"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance GenerateTimeSeriesReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to generate time‑series reports from logged vehicle data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to enable Adaptive Cruise Control on the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to disable Adaptive Cruise Control on the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to set a desired speed for the ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to trigger emergency braking via the steering servo and motor controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ACCControlCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC control command action delivering acceleration/steering set‑points to the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "DT outputs are sent back to the vehicle via Wi‑Fi ROS 2 topics and the Data Translation entity. Control commands include desired speed voltage for the motor controller and steering‑servo position, as well as emergency‑brake instructions and ACC enable/disable signals. The Physical Twin Entity executes these actuation commands through the motor and steering hardware."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT must maintain end‑to‑end latency of ≤ 100 ms (R7) and keep all clocks synchronized to an accuracy of 100 ms (R8); the ACC algorithm runs in real time on the DT with these latency constraints."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation follows ISO 23247’s entity‑based architecture: the Physical Twin Entity hosts sensor acquisition and actuation FEs, the Digital Twin Entity contains data collection, reporting, and ACC control FEs, and the User Entitiy contains visualization and control panel FEs. Inter‑entity communication is orchestrated over a ROS 2 network, with a Data Translation FE mediating serialization and unit conversion. Physical and virtual components run on distributed hardware connected over Wi‑Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Requirement specification (R1–R8), architectural design mapping to ISO 23247 entities, software implementation of FE packages, integration and testing of the DT, and public release of source code and documentation; this iterative case‑study process reflects the life cycle from design to deployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "High‑fidelity real‑time simulation of vehicle dynamics, strict latency (≤ 100 ms) constraints, real‑time data capture from sensors, and safety‑critical ACC execution; validity is ensured by aligning with ISO 15622 specifications and operating within the defined latency bounds."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Wireless communication over Wi‑Fi (IEEE 802.11) links the physical twin and the digital twin; within the DT, ROS 2 nodes communicate via DDS; the Data Translation FE mediates serialization, unit conversion, and timestamp alignment across the network."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Distributed hosting: the vehicle’s Jetson Orin/NX runs the Physical Twin Entity; the Digital Twin Entity runs on a separate compute box or in the cloud executing ROS 2 packages; the User Entity runs on an operator workstation with 3D visualization; all nodes are packaged and deployed using ROS 2 launch files."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT is adopted and adapted, mapping its Functional Entities to code packages. ACC logic follows ISO 15622 for adaptive cruise control specifications. ROS 2 and NVIDIA Jetpack serve as platform standards, and open‑source ROS packages are used for data translation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical requirements include maintaining ≤ 100 ms latency, enabling emergency braking, and ensuring the system’s real‑time control loop; no explicit cybersecurity measures are described in the document."
]
